title: bidens malawiensis
intro: Bidens malawiensis, also known as the Malawi bident, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Malawi. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Its leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which provide various health benefits, including pain relief and wound healing. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Bidens malawiensis for medicinal purposes, and its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
